ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hotels" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel */,
  "hotel_code" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel */,
  "hotel_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "chain_code" INTEGER /* ID of the chain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Descriptive content of the hotel */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hotel */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the hotel */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the hotel */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the hotel */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the hotel */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the hotel */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the hotel */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the hotel */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the hotel */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the hotel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hotel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hotel was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel offering the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., food, recreation, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the service was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the service was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotel_services_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_types" (
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room type */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel offering the room type */,
  "room_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the room type */,
  "room_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the room type */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate of the room type */,
  "max_occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum occupancy of the room type */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the room type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the room type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the room type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_types_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel offering the package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "package_description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate of the package */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of package (e.g., romantic, adventure, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the package was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel offering the amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "amenity_description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the amenity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the amenity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hotel staff, customer, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel the staff member belongs to */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "staff_email" TEXT /* Email of the staff member */,
  "staff_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the staff member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the staff member was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the staff member was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotel_staff_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the search */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the search was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the search was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_history" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the booking */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel being booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date */,
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room type booked */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate of the booking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_history_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES booking_history ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel being reported on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotel_images_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room type the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_images_room_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_type_id") REFERENCES room_types ("room_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Date and time the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Date and time the session ended */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, etc.) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
